7kW_Charger_b1r2p0_v10

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 792
Recv ID: 793
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 67
Func Name: BCB

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "4",
    "supplier": "147",
    "soft": "0103",
    "version": "0000"
  },
  {
    "diagversion": "4",
    "supplier": "147",
    "soft": "0104",
    "version": "0000"
  }
]

  {
    "dtc": 273,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Battery_supply "
  },
